$comment: scripts/OaksLab.asm — Oak himself: parcel delivery first (-> the Pokédex beat), else OaksLabOak1Text's exact branch order — the dex rating once the collection is going (PALLET_AFTER_GETTING_POKEBALLS, or >=2 owned with the dex), then, only with NO POKé BALLs in the bag, the one-time 5-ball gift after the Route 22 rival (.give_poke_balls, fully authored — wave C; the gift lands before the flag so a refused give_item leaves the one-time gift claimable, one improvement over the retired beat), else the story-progress lines.
